name: right_gripper_close
description: Close the right R1Pro gripper. The actual gripper control mode is decided by the active control profile.

parameters.gripper_steps: Number of MuJoCo steps to hold the close command.
parameters.direct_qpos: If true, also write gripper qpos directly. The active control profile may override this.
parameters.attach_on_close: Only honored in direct_qpos debug mode. Physical actuator mode skips attachment.
